name: Mandisa
description: '''Mandisa Lynn Hundley''' ({{IPAc-en|m|ae|n|'|d|iː|s|ə}}) (October 2, 1976 – {{circa|April 18, 2024}}), known [[mononymously]] as '''Mandisa''', was an American [[Gospel music|gospel]] and [[contemporary Christian music|contemporary Christian]] recording artist. She began her solo career as a contestant in the [[American Idol (season 5)|fifth season]] of ''[[American Idol]]'' finishing in ninth place. Her album ''[[Overcomer (album)|Overcomer]]'' won the [[Grammy Award for Best Contemporary Christian Music Album]]; she was the fifth ''American Idol'' contestant to win a Grammy.
